problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: The key to What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost? is Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) — specifically Biomimetic surface structure — which would help 2,200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
